sglang.title: feat(hicache): Support passing prefix keys for l3 store.
sglang.author: hzh0425
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Effective lifecycle management of the ​L3 store​ is critically important in production environments.
In the previous implementation, ​hicache​ read/wrote data to the L3 store using a Key-Value (KV) format, ​but don't transparently transmit prefix information of KV blocks​ to the L3 store.

sglang.title: perf: optimize qwen-vl with symm mem allreduce
sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

The All-Reduce in VL model inference has a high proportion.

Qwen2.5-VL-72B uses inplace all-reduce, by default is NCCL AR which is inefficient.

This PR introduces in-place Symm Mem All-Reduce for Qwen2.5-VL model. (Literally for any other models using in-place AR) Improved 2% e2e input

sglang.title: [HiCache] feat: add multi tenant with prefix tag
sglang.author: stmatengss
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR introduces support for multi-tenancy scenarios when using HiCache with shared storage backends like Mooncake or 3fs. In global service deployments where multiple HiCache (sglang) instances share a common storage backend, we need tenant isolation to prevent key collisions. The --hi

action user PATH=/home/ubun

sglang.title: [router] disable rate limiter by default
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Adds the ability to completely disable rate limiting by setting max_concurrent_requests to -1. When disabled, the router bypasses all rate limiting logic including token bucket creation, queue processing, and concurrency checks.

Changed default max_concurrent_requests

All modes affected: Single-server, PD streaming, and PD non-streaming modes

vllm.author: lgeiger
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The current code does 5 cudaStreamSynchronize( 3 syncs due to CPU-GPU weight copy and 2 syncs inside torch.repeat_interleave) which isn't idea.
This PR removes the blocking weight copy and moves the cu_seqlens to the CPU which is faster and doesn't require any CPU-GPU syncs.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Multi Modal] Fix incorrect Molmo image processing
vllm.author: sangho-vision
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Restore correct Molmo outputs by re-introducing image patch re-ordering using image_input_idx.
In PR #12966, the re-ordering that maps image features to their corresponding patch tokens was removed and replaced with a boolean mask (feat_is_patch). That mask only indicates whether each image
